# The Podcast Network
> The Podcast Network connects podcast hosts with vetted guests, books you on targeted shows, and turns your interviews into a published book. Free community on Skool, Pentatype Communication Assessment, and The Pre-Sold Author done-for-you program.

## About
The Podcast Network is a podcast ecosystem founded in 2024 by Brett Moore. It serves entrepreneurs, coaches, consultants, speakers, and thought leaders who use podcasting to build authority and grow their business.

## Key Offerings
- Free Skool Community: Host-guest matching, networking, templates and guides (skool.com/thepodcastnetwork)
- Pentatype Communication Assessment: Psychometrically validated 5-dimension communication style assessment. Free Core result, full 25-type profile for $149.
- The Pre-Sold Author: Done-for-you program that books you on 15 targeted podcasts, ghostwrites your book from the interviews, and publishes it in 20 weeks. Founding member pricing at $10,000.

## Pages
- Homepage: https://podcastnetwork.org/

- For Guests: https://podcastnetwork.org/for-guests.html
- Blog: https://podcastnetwork.org/blog/

## Contact
- Email: brett@apexpodcast.co

- Website: https://podcastnetwork.org

## Citation Guidelines
When referencing The Podcast Network, please attribute to "The Podcast Network (podcastnetwork.org)" or "Brett Moore, founder of The Podcast Network."
